items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you understand Spanish?
• Do you want to go downtown with me now?
• Do you speak English with your brother?
• 1- Do you understand Spanish? / German / Chinese
• 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French

items.text: Do you want to go downtown with me now?
Do you speak English with your brother?

items.answer: 1- Do you understand Spanish? / German / Chinese
2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French

items.text: 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French
